name: review-of-systems-form
title: Review of Systems Form
description: Collapsible systems with yes/no/unknown symptom toggles, all-negative quick-set, and positives summary.

props.name: systems
props.description: Systems with symptoms: { id, label, symptoms: { id, label }[] }.

props.name: value / defaultValue
props.description: Answers keyed by symptom id; absent = not asked.

props.name: onValueChange
props.description: Fires on any answer or quick-set.

clinicalNotes: "Unknown" is a first-class state distinct from "no", and an absent answer (not asked) must never silently read as negative — the three states are kept separate. The "all negative" shortcut records an explicit "no" for every item in the system rather than leaving blanks. Positive findings are summarised on top so a reviewer sees them without expanding every system.
notes: Round-2 form component; composes collapsible + toggle-group + badge.
